identity: Human WOMAN (female), about 28 years old, calm solemn face, pale skin, long raven-black hair falling past her shoulders.
outfit: Dark indigo-and-charcoal hooded ceremonial robe with silver moon-and-crescent embroidery on the chest. Hood worn UP framing the face but hair clearly visible at the front.
weapons: Iron prayer-mace, dark wooden haft. Silver crescent pendant on a fine chain at the chest, faintly glowing.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-swing downward arc with the iron prayer-mace, silver crescent pendant trailing a streak of pale violet shadow energy.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised, prayer-mace held aloft as a brilliant silver crescent of holy light blooms with violet shadow tendrils curling outward, motes of pale silver and dusk-violet drifting.
blockStyle: East-facing. Prayer-mace held horizontally in front of her chest as a translucent silver crescent ward shimmers along its length.
koStyle: East-facing, lying on her back unconscious, prayer-mace fallen beside her, silver crescent pendant dim, raven-black hair fanned out.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Prayer-mace held point-up in the right hand at her side, raven-black hair framing her face.
portraitStyle: Bust shot, head-and-shoulders facing forward. Dark indigo hood up with silver crescent embroidery, raven-black hair visible at the front, eyes closed in soft prayer, pale skin, silver crescent pendant glowing softly at the chest.

referenceSheet.prompt: A female human Priest (a Cleric of the dusk-vigil order), head-and-shoulders portrait facing forward. Dark indigo-and-charcoal hooded ceremonial robe with silver moon-and-crescent embroidery on the chest, long raven-black hair falling past her shoulders from beneath the hood, calm solemn face, pale skin, faint silver glow from a holy crescent pendant at her chest, eyes closed in soft prayer. Painted 16-bit SNES JRPG pixel art style, clean black outline, soft cel shading, transparent background.
